description_long: This town hall is a large, rectangular public building with a symmetrical layout and a central courtyard. The facade features tall windows, a prominent arched window above the main entrance, and a formal approach lined with evenly spaced trees. The structure is two stories high, with a flat roof and multiple entry points, including a grand main entrance flanked by columns. The exterior is finished in a muted beige color, and the grounds include landscaped greenery and paved walkways. The interior appears to be divided into several rooms and offices, with visible staircases and open communal spaces.
description: A stately, two-story town hall with a central courtyard, tall windows, and a formal tree-lined entrance. The building features a beige facade, flat roof, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, arched window, symmetrical facade, and tree-lined approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, side windows, and the continuation of the landscaped courtyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, large windows, and the full width of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, additional entry points, and the extent of the courtyard greenery.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Arched windows, columns flanking the entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, minimal decorative moldings
attribute_entrance_design: One main entrance with double doors, arched transom window, flanked by columns and approached by a wide paved path
